tools.name: get_coverage
tools.description: Check which competitive signals RivalSweeper has for an eCommerce domain, with per-signal freshness. Free and non-billable - call this before any billable tool so you never pay for a domain we do not cover.

tools.name: get_promotions
tools.description: Active promotions/discount codes for a brand: code, discount type/value, min order, validity window. Freshness-stamped. 1 credit; no data = no charge.

tools.name: get_competitor_price
tools.description: Price statistics (min/max/avg/median) plus recent product samples for a brand, optionally filtered by product-name query. Freshness-stamped. 1 credit; no data = no charge.

tools.name: get_readiness_score
tools.description: RivalSweeper 6-pillar AI/agent-readiness score for a domain (schema.org, technical access, content quality, trust, AI-specific, entity recognition) with tier and highlights. Uniquely RivalSweeper data. 1 credit; no data = no charge.

tools.name: get_brand_snapshot
tools.description: Bundle: all current signals for one brand-day - promotions, price stats + samples, AI-readiness - in one call. 15 credits; no data = no charge.

tools.name: get_history
tools.description: Monthly time-series of price changes (drops/rises/avg delta) or stock-status flips for a brand. Depth-tiered: up to 3 months = 5 credits, 4-12 months = 8, 13-24 months = 13. No data = no charge.

tools.name: request_monitoring
tools.description: Ask RivalSweeper to add a domain to monitoring. Free, but requires an account with a positive prepaid balance. First data typically lands within 24-72h.
